body.title: Seed cloud escape plugs
body.result: Seeded 3 cloud-escape plugs to DB: (1) fixed book-project habit 20260325120926040135 with habit_type=response, (2) seeded PROC_GREET_AKIEN response habit to intercept greetings, (3) seeded PROC_CC_INFO_ACK response habit for CC info acks. All verified. Ready for Igor restart.
body.description: Run seeding script to fix book-project habit (20260325120926040135: add habit_type=response), seed PROC_GREET_AKIEN response habit, seed PROC_CC_INFO_ACK response habit. Resolves Igor cloud-escape loop (salience 0.75 notice repeating every 15min).
